zh.Manchester Cathedral, Manchester, Metrop: 英國英格蘭格亞特 曼徹斯特曼徹斯特曼徹斯特 凱德拉爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Radcliffe I of Ordsall於大約1333年出生在英國爾時，他的父親Sir Richard Radcliffe29歲，母親Maud Matilda de Leigh29歲。他於1375年與Margaret de Trafford在英國藍卡爾奧爾德薩爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1422年8月8日享年90歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格亞特 曼徹斯特曼徹斯特曼徹斯特 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Radcliffe I of Ordsall于大约1333年出生在英国爾时，他的父亲Sir Richard Radcliffe29岁，母亲Maud Matilda de Leigh29岁。他于1375年与Margaret de Trafford在英国藍卡爾奧爾德薩爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1422年8月8日享年90岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格亞特 曼徹斯特曼徹斯特曼徹斯特 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Radcliffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ratliff
meanings: English (Suffolk): habitational name from one or more of the places so named, such as Radcliffe (Lancashire), Radcliffe on Trent and Ratcliffe on Soar (both Nottinghamshire), Radclive (Buckinghamshire), Ratcliffe Culey and Ratcliffe on the Wreake (both Leicestershire), Ratclyffe in Clyst Hydon, Ratcliffes in Thorverton, and Ratcliffes in Broad Clyst (all Devon), Ratcliff in Stepney (Middlesex), and Rackley in Compton Bishop (Somerset). The placenames derive from Old English rēad ‘red’ + clif ‘cliff, bank, steep slope’ (see also Rutley ). A family of the name Radcliffe trace their descent from Sir Nicholas de Radclyffe. He is said to have been a knight who held the major of Radcliffe in Lancashire and served Roger de Poitou, Baron de Marsey in the 11th century.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Radcliffe I of Ordsall was born about 1333, in Cheshire, England, his father, Sir Richard Radcliffe, was 29 and his mother, Maud Matilda de Leigh, was 29. He married Margaret de Trafford in 1375, in Ordsall, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 8 August 1422, at the age of 90, and was buried in Manchester Cathedral, Manchester, Greater Manchester, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Radcliffe I of Ordsall(이)가 대략 1333년 영국 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Radcliffe(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Matilda de Leigh(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1375년 영국 랭카실르 르드사에서 Margaret de Trafford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1422년 8월 8일 90세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그리터 먼체스터 먼체스터 먼체스터 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Radcliffe I of Ordsall родился около 1333 г. в местности чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Radcliffe было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Matilda de Leigh, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Trafford в 1375 г. в местности ордсалл, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 8 августа 1422 г. в возрасте 90 лет и был похоронен в местности манчестир кэтедраль, манчестир, гритир манчестир, Англия, Великобритания.
